name: mikrocanvas
description: Local-first visual canvas for fast ad hoc thinking.
author: Mikael Vesavuori

scripts.start: npm run build && npx http-server dist -a ${HOST:-127.0.0.1} -p ${PORT:-8000} -c-1
scripts.docs: npm run docs:install && npm --prefix docs run dev
scripts.docs:build: npm run docs:install && npm --prefix docs run build
scripts.docs:preview: npm run docs:install && npm --prefix docs run preview
scripts.lint: biome check src tests scripts esbuild.config.mts vitest.config.mts package.json tsconfig.json biome.json
scripts.lint:fix: biome check src tests scripts esbuild.config.mts vitest.config.mts package.json tsconfig.json biome.json --write
scripts.format: biome format --write src tests scripts esbuild.config.mts vitest.config.mts package.json tsconfig.json biome.json
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run docs:build
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run sbom && npm run scan && npm run licenses && npm run release:assets
scripts.scan: mkdir -p security && grype sbom:security/sbom.spdx.json -o json > security/grype-report.json
scripts.licenses: mkdir -p security && grant check security/sbom.spdx.json --config .grant.yaml > security/grant-report.txt || { cat security/grant-report.txt; exit 1; }
scripts.precommit: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
